pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missing features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 17; keeping java.version at 11 would result in incorrect compiler flags and potential runtime incompatibilities with Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated MySQL connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer Spring Boot 3 dependencies; the new artifact 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is the required replacement.
